name: prod-checkout-web-01
top: Log4Shell (CVE-2021-44228) unpatched, exploited in the wild

evidence.text: CVE-2021-44228 · CVSS 10.0. KB confirms active exploitation. Detected on 2 open ports.
Reflected SQL injection on /checkout/apply-promo, severity 5, first seen 6 days ago.
Fails CIS 5.2.9 — SSH root login is not disabled on this host.
Job Q3-log4j-remediation targets this CVE but has not run yet — recommend expediting.

name: aws-rds-prod-eu1
top: Security group allows public ingress on the DB port

evidence.text: CDR flags security group sg-04a1 as publicly accessible on port 5432.
Fails encryption-at-rest control for managed database instances.
No Cloud Agent on this asset class — coverage gap, score may be understated.

name: k8s-checkout-node-07
top: Base image carries the xz backdoor CVE

evidence.text: Host kernel exposed to CVE-2023-4863 (libwebp heap overflow).
Patch kernel-5.15.0-105 available, no job scheduled — recommend creating one.

name: corp-vpn-gw-02
top: Known-exploited SSL VPN CVE, no monitoring agent

evidence.text: CVE-2018-13379 path-traversal on SSL VPN portal, KB marks as actively exploited.
Firmware is 3 versions behind the compliant baseline.
No Cloud Agent — blind spot on an internet-facing device.

name: staging-api-internal-03
top: Medium-severity findings only, no external exposure

evidence.text: 3 medium-severity CVEs, none with known exploitation.
Agent healthy · internal network segment only.
